display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: An attempt on Alma's life prompts Swearengen to take her into protective custody. But who is responsible for the attempted murder? Gritty drama.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: Both Detectives Bolander and Howard return to work on the same day. Kay Howard obsesses over the relocation of her desk while she was out.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: On the eve of his execution, the accused's daughter takes Col Barnfather hostage, demanding a reinvestigation of the case to save her father.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: The third chapter of the heated rivalry between Chuck Rhoades and Bobby Axelrod begins. Post-indictment, Axe faces a difficult decision.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck tries to cash in a favour owed to him by an honourable judge. Axe orchestrates creative new avenues for conducting trades.

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Albie asks Dominic for a karmic payment to help Lucia. Tanya grows wary of Quentin's motives. Ethan confronts Cam. (S2, epof.

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Belinda arrives, Chelsea deals with Rick, The Ratliffs split up and Kate, Laurie and Jaclyn settle in. (S3, ep 1 of.

programme.title: Gomorrah
programme.desc: Genny asks some businessmen for cash to fund a new load of cocaine. Meanwhile, Ciro and Nunzia receive an unexpected visit. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Gomorrah
programme.desc: To win the market, Genny starts dumping cocaine at half price. But Ciro also knows how to hit Genny where it hurts most. Violent scenes.

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: As George heads to Pittsburgh to deal with the potential strike, Bertha gets word that the Duke will return for opening night at the Met. (S2, ep 6 of.

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: As New York celebrates a historic event, Bertha reconsiders her loyalty to the Met. Marian has doubts about her future. (S2, ep 7 of.

programme.title: The Five Star Weekend
programme.desc: Shopping In Town: The stars go shopping in Nantucket. Dru's cancellation gets real, forcing Hollis and Dru to deal with the reality of their friendship.

programme.title: The Five Star Weekend
programme.desc: The Spa: The stars go to the spa for some relaxation, but Electra shows up and threatens Hollis and Brooke's growing friendship.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: As Detective Alcaras investigates Milo's disappearance, Marissa and Jenny work to raise awareness and a press conference turns ugly. (2 of.

programme.title: Dtf St. Louis
programme.desc: Floyd's ego takes a hit after a failed attempt to reconnect with Carol, leading Clark to help his friend using the DTF app.

programme.title: Dtf St. Louis
programme.desc: It Just Looks That Way from Across the Street: Plumb and Homer are forced to question everything they thought they knew.

programme.title: Station Eleven
programme.desc: After renowned actor Arthur Leander collapses on stage, Jeevan Chaudhary and young Kirsten Raymonde's chance meeting leads to a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Station Eleven
programme.desc: Twenty years later, Kirsten and the Traveling Symphony encounter a mysterious man on their way to perform at St. Deborah-by-the-Water.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe explores the new arena of venture philanthropy and looks to neutralise old accomplices. Chuck tries to reconcile with his father.

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan returns to London as he walks from one iconic market to another, ambling from Smithfields to Spitalfields where he meets fellow actor Larry Lamb.

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant visits the most luxurious hotels in the Japanese capital, as well as checking out the city's love hotels.

programme.title: Richard E Grant's Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, Richard travels to Italy to explore the most exclusive and exciting hotels in the Floating City.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Trixie decides to take the Hearst matter into her own hands, leaving the rest of the camp to deal with what she's done... Gritty drama.

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: In the last ever episode of the gritty drama, election day arrives in Deadwood. The evil Hearst is still in town with unfinished business.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: When Crosetti's caseload is to be distributed among the detectives, Howard's 100% clearance rate leads Giardello to assign her a difficult case.

programme.title: Homicide: Life On The Street
programme.desc: When Bayliss' cousin shoots a 'crazed' Turkish young man at his door, Pembleton and Bayliss differ on motive.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Chuck faces a dilemma when he's given a perverse directive. Taylor and Wags interview a different type of Axe Capital employee.

programme.title: Billions
programme.desc: Axe explores the new arena of venture philanthropy and looks to neutralise old accomplices. Chuck tries to reconcile with his father.

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Timothy worries about his business. Chelsea connects with expat Chloe. Gaitok shares his feelings with Mook. (S3, ep 2 of.

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Jaclyn pushes the idea of a vacation fling on Laurie. Chelsea finds herself in a perilous situation. (S3, ep 3 of.

programme.title: Gomorrah
programme.desc: Genny pressures Ruggieri to find out where his son is. Meanwhile, Ciro and Nunzia find new and unexpected allies. Violent scenes.

programme.title: Gomorrah
programme.desc: Ciro and Genny get together for a final trip. Locked in the cockpit, the two of them are forced to face their demons. Violent scenes.

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: In Terms of Winning and Losing: Marian confesses her true feelings, while Bertha and Mrs Astor make their final moves in the opera war. Season finale. (S2, epof.

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: George unfurls his railway plan. Bertha awaits the Duke's return. Ada helps the temperance movement. (S3, ep 1 of.

programme.title: Station Eleven
programme.desc: After renowned actor Arthur Leander collapses on stage, Jeevan Chaudhary and young Kirsten Raymonde's chance meeting leads to a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Station Eleven
programme.desc: Twenty years later, Kirsten and the Traveling Symphony encounter a mysterious man on their way to perform at St. Deborah-by-the-Water.

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: Separated and under pressure, Amber turns to Tibor for help as a wider threat begins to emerge.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: After killing her husband to be with her young lover, an insecure woman is drawn in by a flyer for an anti-ageing process known as the Gift of Beauty.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: George Princey has a high standing in the community. So when his daughter kills a man, George endeavours to cover it up to avoid facing a scandal.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Meyer Fine, a gangster with an intense fear of death, learns that rivals are planning to kill him. His faithful servant tearfully agrees to do the deed instead.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A rich old man proposes to his secretary and says she will inherit $11million. She declines but her fiancé attempts to convince her. Hazel Court stars.

programme.title: Discovering: William Holden
programme.desc: A fascinating look at the life and career of William Holden, an actor who became one of Hollywood's biggest box office draws from the 1950s through to the 1970s.

programme.title: Hugh Grant: Love Language
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the charming and complex career of British actor Hugh Grant, whose wit, charisma and vulnerability made him a defining figure in romantic comedies.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Having arranged the death of her very wealthy husband in order to be with her lover Stephen, Olivia becomes increasingly annoyed by his lack of appreciation.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Jack and Edna's pet parrot dies after laying an unusually large egg. On hatching, it reveals an aggressive black-feathered bird, spelling immediate trouble.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An executive plans to end an associate's love affair, saving the man's career and marriage.

programme.title: Discovering: Barbara Stanwyck
programme.desc: A profile of Barbara Stanwyck, an actress who enjoyed a 60-year career in film and television, best known for her strong female roles in films, such as Double Indemnity.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Circle back to 1985 for another dive into the vaults, with fascinating interviews and brilliant performances from Bangles, The Associates and more.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year...
programme.desc: Alexa Chung, Nish Kumar, Philip Glenister: Kathleen Soriano, Tai Shan Schierenberg and Kate Bryan judge more portraits in the heats.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: I Like It Here In Wilmington: When a clothing manufacturer finds himself on the verge of bankruptcy, he ponders the idea of murdering his wife for the insurance money.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Steve and Jane are con artists who gain access to people's homes claiming to be doing research into polish. But eventually, they meet their match.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Singer Crystal Coe is being harassed by her ex-husband. He manages to track her down and makes her life a misery. Polly Bergen and Joe Maross star.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A fame-hungry woman fakes an assault and blames it on a masked attacker in order to gain notoriety. Susan Harrison stars.

programme.title: Discovering: Ed Harris
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Hollywood superstar, whose notable works include acclaimed performances in Apollo 13, The Truman Show and The Hours.

programme.title: Gene Kelly: An American In Hollywood
programme.desc: From his beginnings in cabarets and on Broadway to his recognition as a choreographer and director, the star with a charming smile expanded the boundaries of dance expression.

programme.title: Michael Caine: The Becoming of a Hollywood Star
programme.desc: An exploration of Sir Michael Caine's illustrious career, from his early days in 1950s British theatre to gaining fame for his legendary contribution to cinema.

programme.title: Don Siegel: The Directors
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life and career of American film director Don Siegel, known for the sci-fi film Invasion of the Body Snatchers and his work with Clint Eastwood.

programme.title: Discovering Romance On Film
programme.desc: Film critics Ian Nathan, Bonnie Greer, Neil Norman and Stephen Armstrong discuss their favourite romance movies of all time, including Casablanca and When Harry Met Sally.

programme.title: Backstage: Ralph Fiennes In Straight Line Crazy
programme.desc: Ralph Fiennes is joined in dress rehearsals as he discusses his involvement in and the themes relating to David Hare's brand-new play Straight Line Crazy.

programme.title: Discovering: Ralph Fiennes
programme.desc: The story of the life and career of a generational star of the silver screen, known for his roles in Schindler's List, The Grand Budapest Hotel and The Menu.

programme.title: The Art Of The Garden
programme.desc: Two projects separated by a few miles, James' touch sums up two types of work that land on the desks of garden designers. (6 of.

programme.title: Hugh Grant: Love Language
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the charming and complex career of British actor Hugh Grant, whose wit, charisma and vulnerability made him a defining figure in romantic comedies.

programme.title: Classic FM Live: Greatest Hits Hits of Opera
programme.desc: The Royal Albert Hall comes to life with hits from the world of opera. Hosted by Alexander Armstrong and Myleene Klass and filmed in April 2023.

programme.title: The Joy Of Painting
programme.desc: Bob uses all of his skill and experience to create a comforting winter scene, complete with a homely barn and fluffy bushes.

programme.title: The Joy Of Painting
programme.desc: Misty background evergreens and a cheerful blue sky give Bob the ideal setting in this stunning masterpiece.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Having arranged the death of her very wealthy husband in order to be with her lover Stephen, Olivia becomes increasingly annoyed by his lack of appreciation.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Jack and Edna's pet parrot dies after laying an unusually large egg. On hatching, it reveals an aggressive black-feathered bird, spelling immediate trouble.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Singer Crystal Coe is being harassed by her ex-husband. He manages to track her down and makes her life a misery. Polly Bergen and Joe Maross star.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A fame-hungry woman fakes an assault and blames it on a masked attacker in order to gain notoriety. Susan Harrison stars.

programme.title: Discovering: Barbara Stanwyck
programme.desc: A profile of Barbara Stanwyck, an actress who enjoyed a 60-year career in film and television, best known for her strong female roles in films, such as Double Indemnity.

programme.title: The Myth Of Marilyn Monroe
programme.desc: Marilyn Monroe is the defining icon of the 50s. A shining example of the American dream. However, as the decade continued, the myth of Marilyn and the American Dream seemed to crumble.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: I Like It Here In Wilmington: When a clothing manufacturer finds himself on the verge of bankruptcy, he ponders the idea of murdering his wife for the insurance money.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Steve and Jane are con artists who gain access to people's homes claiming to be doing research into polish. But eventually, they meet their match.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: The death of a man's wife is ruled an accident, but strange incidents at the widower's place of work raise new questions.

programme.title: Discovering: Gregory Peck
programme.desc: An eye-opening look at the life and films of American film legend Gregory Peck, the Academy Award-winning star of the 1962 drama To Kill a Mockingbird.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Head back in time for a visit to 1979, with exclusive interviews and magical performances from Tina Turner, Wings, The Who and more iconic artists.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year...
programme.desc: The competition continues as the artists create portraits and present them to the judges.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: Seeking a divorce from his wife, an unhappy husband hires a private eye in the hopes of catching her with another man. But things don't quite go as expected.

programme.title: Tales Of The Unexpected
programme.desc: When a married politician falls in love with a woman at a party, things soon go wrong and his entire career and reputation are put in jeopardy.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Mr Clarke is terrified of guns being pointed at him and feels he must destroy anyone who would do that to him, including a young robber. George Nader stars.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man is bored in his marriage and leaves his wife. When he hires a private investigator for their divorce, he discovers that she is living a secret life.

programme.title: Guy Garvey: From The Vaults
programme.desc: Circle back to 1985 for another dive into the vaults, with fascinating interviews and brilliant performances from Bangles, The Associates and more.

programme.title: Live from Abbey Road: Paul Simon, David Gilmour, Sheryl Crow
programme.desc: A blend of global icons from a critically acclaimed series, featuring performances in the historic Abbey Road Studios.

programme.title: Live from Abbey Road: Red Hot Chili Peppers, Green Day, Muse
programme.desc: A blend of global icons perform live from the historic Abbey Road Studios, showcasing some of the most exciting sets from over the years.

programme.title: Siouxsie And The Banshees: Nocturne
programme.desc: Rediscover Siouxsie and the Banshees at the height of their gothic success, travelling back to the 80s with inspired performances of some of their greatest songs.

programme.title: Gemini
programme.desc: A heinous crime tests the complex relationship between a Hollywood starlet and her tenacious personal assistant. As the assistant unravels the mystery, she must confront her own understanding of friendship, truth and celebrity.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Chris and Dovare are trapped in a dangerous meth house during a sting operation; Luke helps Jo with a surveillance job in a hotel room.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A notorious gang appears to be involved in the murder of a police informant; Detective Rosati reveals something that puts Andy's relationship with Luke in danger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy worries her personal problems are affecting her professionally when a woman is brutally attacked on her watch; Luke's erratic behavior leads to him being kicked off a case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: 15 Division is placed under quarantine when a man collapses from a mysterious illness; Dov's date with an attractive bomb technician ends unexpectedly.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Gail and Dov work with Swarerk as they try to protect an informant from a dangerous gang; Chris and Andy participate in competitive equine training.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Swarek come across a car accident while pursuing a child and his kidnapper; Chris fights with Dov over an indiscretion; Andy worries life is passing her by.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: An undercover training exercise challenges Andy, Dov and Traci; Gail and Chris find a tied-up teenager at a graveyard.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team is on the verge of putting away members of the Mala Noche gang, but the gang's planned hit on Horatio endangers the lives of those close to him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio mourns the murder of someone close to him as he and the team hunt for the killer; the revelation of the mole's identity jeopardizes the future of the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Delko travel to Brazil in pursuit of Marisol's killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Calleigh is run off the road into a canal, the evidence she is carrying becomes corrupted, so the team must uncover new evidence to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a celebrity is murdered at an A-list party, the team uncovers a counterfeiting ring producing $100 bills.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Male models' good looks may have cost them their lives; Natalia's abusive ex-husband begins stalking her at the lab.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A politician supports the use of eminent domain to clean up a neighborhood, and his dead body is later found in an empty house.

programme.title: Fire Country
programme.desc: Bode sets out to prove his leadership skills during a historic cold snap that plunges Edgewater into crisis mode; Jake contemplates a life-altering decision that could change his future forever.

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: When their driver sells them out, Amber withholds Tibor's lifesaving medication to find out her family's location.

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: Clyde Shelton is an honorable family man, until the day his wife and daughter are murdered in a home invasion. He hopes for justice, but a rising prosecutor named Nick Rice cuts a deal with one of the killers in exchange for testimony. Ten years later, that man is found dead.

programme.title: Prisoner
programme.desc: When their driver sells them out, Amber withholds Tibor's lifesaving medication to find out her family's location.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team is on the verge of putting away members of the Mala Noche gang, but the gang's planned hit on Horatio endangers the lives of those close to him.

programme.title: Law Abiding Citizen
programme.desc: Clyde Shelton is an honorable family man, until the day his wife and daughter are murdered in a home invasion. He hopes for justice, but a rising prosecutor named Nick Rice cuts a deal with one of the killers in exchange for testimony. Ten years later, that man is found dead.

programme.title: Call Me Fitz
programme.desc: When Fitz can't horn his way into Ken and Elaine's church scam, he decides to start his own religion.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa's honesty gets him into trouble; when Janet takes Gerald to the hospital, she runs into an old friend; Jung accidentally books two people to audition with him for his favorite reality show.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma and Appa accidentally damage a car; Janet finds out that Gerald isn't as loyal as she had thought; Jung is concerned that his birthday message is too personal.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma tries to hide the fact that she lost something valuable; Jung threatens to ruin Janet's chance with a yoga instructor; Shannon and Kimchee win a BBQ.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma are at odds over a wedding dress, while Shannon and Jung struggle with cultural sensitivities after a visit to a burger joint; Janet grapples with the fallout of Raj's canceled engagement and faces an awkward night out with Nathan.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: While Appa is reluctant to have a houseguest, Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor; Jung accuses Janet of being cold-hearted; Shannon tackles an office bullying problem.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet; Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess; Shannon is finally single, but Jung is unsure if he will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa's honesty gets him into trouble; when Janet takes Gerald to the hospital, she runs into an old friend; Jung accidentally books two people to audition with him for his favorite reality show.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Umma and Appa accidentally damage a car; Janet finds out that Gerald isn't as loyal as she had thought; Jung is concerned that his birthday message is too personal.

programme.desc: Umma tries to hide the fact that she lost something valuable; Jung threatens to ruin Janet's chance with a yoga instructor; Shannon and Kimchee win a BBQ.

programme.desc: Appa's honesty gets him into trouble; when Janet takes Gerald to the hospital, she runs into an old friend; Jung accidentally books two people to audition with him for his favorite reality show.

programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet; Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess; Shannon is finally single, but Jung is unsure if he will make a move.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins tries to root out a government worker who is withholding green cards in exchange for sex.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The female CEO of a popular wellness company says she was raped, but her business partner claims the accusation is part of an embezzlement cover-up.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Rollins' sister stirs up trouble and a possible SVU investigation when she reports a doctor who trades prescription painkillers for sex.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An ingénue ballerina discovers she's been secretly videotaped for a pornographic website.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Chief Garland must put friendship aside when a pastor at his church is arrested.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: An ancient struggle between two Cybertronian races, the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons, comes to Earth, with a clue to the ultimate power held by a teenager.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: The naive young daughter of a show boat captain is thrust into the limelight as the company's new leading lady.

programme.title: True North Classics
programme.desc: The best in short film from the 1930s to 1960s.

programme.title: Dr. Ho Talks
programme.desc: Dr. Ho discusses getting relief from pain and tension in the comfort of one's home.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: A newspaper editor uses every trick in the book to keep his ace reporter ex-wife from remarrying; starring Claudette Colbert.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: A high school drummer and his girlfriend unite the music-loving kids in town with the dream to win Paul Whiteman's band contest; starring Judy Garland.

programme.title: Classroom Classics
programme.desc: Featuring "Sharing Work at Home" and "Self Conscious Guy.".

programme.title: Retrola: Canada's Time Machine
programme.desc: Images of family memories and Toronto transit.

programme.title: Postcards From Canada
programme.desc: Images of the East Coast and Canadian Winters.

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: Murder Legendre is the menacingly named zombie master of Haiti. Charles Beaumont goes to him when he needs help for a twisted plan. Spurned in marriage by Madeline Short, Beaumont has decided on a simple solution: kill Short and bring her back as a zombie. Then he can be with her forever. The only problem comes when Legendre keeps the fetching girl for himself -- and her new husband comes to Madel

programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Karloff introduces tales of a haunted nurse (Jacqueline Pierreux), a stalked call-girl (Michèle Mercier) and a vampire (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: Scars of Dracula
programme.desc: Bat's blood hits Dracula's (Christopher Lee) ashes, and he rises again to fight a couple (Dennis Waterman, Jenny Hanley) looking for trouble.

programme.title: Nightmare Castle
programme.desc: A deranged scientist, Dr. Stephen Arrowsmith, catches his beautiful wife, Muriel, conducting an affair with their gardener, David. The enraged Arrowsmith imprisons the lovers in his laboratory. Chained to the wall, Muriel and David suffer slow, painful deaths as the vicious Arrowsmith inflicts sadistic torture upon them. Believing he has achieved his vengeance, the doctor isn't pleased when his vi

programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Karloff introduces tales of a haunted nurse (Jacqueline Pierreux), a stalked call-girl (Michèle Mercier) and a vampire (Boris Karloff).

programme.title: The Poppy Is Also a Flower
programme.desc: Drug agents trace opium from Iran to the South of France after another agent is killed for trying to buy the drug.

programme.title: Mozambique
programme.desc: An American pilot (Steve Cochran) and a singer (Vivi Bach) land in a mess involving drugs, murder and a recent widow (Hildegarde Neff).

programme.title: Girl Gang
programme.desc: A gangster hooks gangs of young women on drugs and has them commit robberies and prostitution.

programme.title: Guns, Girls and Gangsters
programme.desc: A Las Vegas singer (Mamie Van Doren) plans an armored-car robbery with her husband's (Lee Van Cleef) ex-cellmate (Gerald Mohr).

programme.title: True North Classics
programme.desc: The best in short film from the 1930s to 1960s.

programme.title: Postcards From Canada
programme.desc: Images of the East Coast and Canadian Winters.

programme.title: Retrola: Canada's Time Machine
programme.desc: Images of Canadians doing various activities throughout history.

programme.title: Classroom Classics
programme.desc: Featuring "The Benefits of Looking Ahead" and "Social Courtesy.".

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: When a woman meets a reporter looking for a story, she feigns a mortal sickness for her own profit; starring Douglas Fairbanks Jr.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: In the 1850s Louisiana, a free-spirited Southern belle loses her fiancé due to her stubborn vanity and pride and vows to win him back; starring Loretta Young.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: A dedicated Midwestern teacher recalls her life's triumphs and tragedies; starring Martha Scott.

programme.title: Lux Radio Theatre
programme.desc: A rookie pilot joins the Hellcats squadron and tries to prove himself; starring Robert Taylor and Walter Pidgeon.

programme.title: Classroom Classics
programme.desc: Featuring "Towards Emotional Maturity" and "The Bully.".

programme.title: Retrola: Canada's Time Machine
programme.desc: Images.

programme.title: Postcards From Canada
programme.desc: Images of the East Coast and Canadian Winters.

programme.title: True North Classics
programme.desc: The best in short film from the 1930s to 1960s.

programme.title: The Poppy Is Also a Flower
programme.desc: Drug agents trace opium from Iran to the South of France after another agent is killed for trying to buy the drug.

programme.title: Girl Gang
programme.desc: A gangster hooks gangs of young women on drugs and has them commit robberies and prostitution.

programme.title: The Poppy Is Also a Flower
programme.desc: Drug agents trace opium from Iran to the South of France after another agent is killed for trying to buy the drug.

programme.title: Mozambique
programme.desc: An American pilot (Steve Cochran) and a singer (Vivi Bach) land in a mess involving drugs, murder and a recent widow (Hildegarde Neff).

programme.title: Guns, Girls and Gangsters
programme.desc: A Las Vegas singer (Mamie Van Doren) plans an armored-car robbery with her husband's (Lee Van Cleef) ex-cellmate (Gerald Mohr).

programme.title: Things to Come
programme.desc: It's Christmas 1940, and Everytown resident John Cabal (Raymond Massey) fears that war is imminent. When it breaks out, the war lasts 30 years, destroying the city and ushering in a new dark age of plagues and petty despots. But there is hope in the form of Wings Over the World, a group of pacifist scientists and thinkers lead by Cabal. Their dream is to build a utopian society on the ruins of the

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Paul and Ally take a 'family' vacation without the kids. Luke makes a decision about the future of his education and life with Maya.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Paul and Ally rush to fly back from their holiday when they hear that Maya is giving birth five weeks early.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Trapped at the Wellfulness Commune, Lucky starts to unravel its secrets as Meg finally gets the chance to speak to her mother.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: After escaping the commune, Lucky and Meg race back to Sydney hoping to make it in time to meet Billie at the airport.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part 1: Will and Grace start a new business renovating and re-selling houses, and Karen and Lyle's relationship hits a rocky patch when Lorraine moves in.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Part 2: Will and Grace face a dilemma when they're offered a higher sum for a house they'd promised to Jack. Lorraine's presence causes rifts between Karen and Lyle.

programme.title: The Rehearsal
programme.desc: Nathan Fielder decides to put his resources into something big.

programme.title: The Rehearsal
programme.desc: In his determined effort to find a solution, Nathan draws extensively on his past.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Trapped at the Wellfulness Commune, Lucky starts to unravel its secrets as Meg finally gets the chance to speak to her mother.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: After escaping the commune, Lucky and Meg race back to Sydney hoping to make it in time to meet Billie at the airport.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen decides she wants to meet 'real people' and befriends an uncannily similar office worker, while Will gets hooked on painkillers after twisting his ankle.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will ends up opposing Karen in a court case but realises that her lawyer is completely inept, and Jack temporarily takes over as Grace's assistant.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: As Deborah perfects her second run at Late Night, Ava receives her dream offer and Jimmy and Kayla grow their company.

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: With Deborah determined to boot her from Late Night, Ava attempts to beat her boss at her own game. (S4, ep 1 of.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: While on a road trip to get rid of a Greendale artefact, Abed turns a situation into a feature film.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: When a secret game of paintball occurs on campus, Frankie threatens to expel those who participate.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace clash with real-estate moguls Deidre and Monet when they plan to expand to the East Side. Karen seeks spiritual guidance.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack gets an unwelcome surprise when he and Grace go to the cinema, and Will attempts to teach Karen to drive - with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Part 1: The office is still buzzing with talk about their day at the beach. A job opportunity in corporate pits Michael, Jim and Karen against each other.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Part 2: Michael, Jim and Karen all go head-to-head in the final job interview in New York. Second part of the season finale.

programme.desc: Paul and Ally take a 'family' vacation without the kids. Luke makes a decision about the future of his education and life with Maya.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Paul and Ally rush to fly back from their holiday when they hear that Maya is giving birth five weeks early.

programme.title: Jack Dee: Small World
programme.desc: Recorded live at the London Palladium, join Jack Dee as he guides you through his varied life and career with his customary charm and well-known gift for talking absolute rubbish.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Wounded in the rainforest, Lucky is desperate to return to civilisation, but Meg wants to push on as they get close to finding her mother.

programme.title: Upright
programme.desc: Meg and Lucky finally make it to the Wellfulness Commune, but don't get the reception they were expecting.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: A big decision is decided by the flip of a coin and at the end of it all, a new adventure begins.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is set up on a blind date by his boss, but faces internal torment on whether to go. Jack gives him some advice.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Secrets are spilled when Rob and Ellen ask Will and Grace to be the best man and maid of honour at their wedding.

programme.title: Breeders
programme.desc: Part One: Paul and Ally try to help a struggling Luke but find they have different ideas about the best way forward.

programme.title: Breeders

programme.title: I Love LA
programme.desc: On her 27th birthday, Maia's carefully laid plans are upended by the sudden return of her best friend, Tallulah.

programme.title: I Love LA

programme.title: I Love LA
programme.desc: After reconciling, Maia and Tallulah step into their new roles as manager and client while tackling an erratic situation.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Stan suddenly passes away during their divorce, Karen faces a war of wills with her British love rival. Grace, meanwhile, is forced to make a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: The gang set off on a Caribbean cruise to scatter Stan's ashes, but Grace's mind is elsewhere, fretting about the seductive MD currently working with Leo in Guatemala.

programme.desc: As their sixth year at Greendale draws to a close, everyone imagines pitching a TV show about what they would do in season seven.

programme.desc: Will takes some ill-advised romantic tips from Grace, while Karen and Jack mourn the loss of their favourite TV shows, Frasier and Friends.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will introduces Grace to new boyfriend Vince but doesn't get quite the reaction he hoped for, and Jack holds auditions for a Karen-replacement.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Artists whose work takes them out of the office and into the sand, sun and waves, including a Cuban bathing suit designer, an Australian surfboard shaper, and a contest that takes sand castles to new heights.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Going behind the scenes at a drag pageant put on to raise money for charity, exploring the transformation of one of Ru Paul's Drag Race contestants, and a documentary filmmaker who wants to put the lesser known world of drag kings on the map.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: A hearty dose of laughs from three distinct areas of comedy: stand-up at the Tiger Lily show, a podcast with Bill Burr and Al Madrigal, and Groundlings improv group.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Meet the design team that created the fountains of the Bellagio, get gluttonous at the Cosmopolitan's world-famous Wicked Spoon food hall, and see what it takes to be a showgirl at the last classic showgirl revue in Vegas.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Famous thriller author Frank O'Toole is found stabbed through the heart in the middle of the ocean.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A woman is poisoned during a faith healing ceremony and evidences point to the healer himself.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The island's Day of the Dead celebrations are cut short by a woman's death and Jack and his team must navigate the waters of the elitist Yacht Club in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The leader of a spiritual retreat is found strangled and Jack and the team are confounded by the fact that all their suspects were in a meditation circle at the time of the murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: One of Barnaby's suspects is found dead in his restaurant's walk-in freezer; two bodies are found by a river.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A gambler appears to have committed suicide.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: On Halloween night, septuagenarian Jacob Cranage thinks he sees a body being buried on the beach; the police investigate and find nothing, but Pearl stays on the case and soon spots evidence that there may be a missing dead body in Whitstable.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Ruth has a mystery admirer who unnerves her; Louisa gets in trouble with Bert when one of her students writes about getting food poisoning at his restaurant.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin takes baby James to playgroup, where he is forced to sing along with the other moms; Al signs up for a dating website; Bert finds Jennifer in the bathroom with a needle.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Mrs. Tishell returns to the village; Martin has to work out what is wrong with beachcomber Lorna; Al and Morwenna have Internet dating disasters.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin's mother returns to Portwenn; questions about asbestos cause panic; Bert has a question for Jennifer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An explosion at a freight company.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Towering hair sculptures, vintage looks and natural hair care styling.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Artists who take their work to the street - from Toyota's design team's latest concept car, to the Peterson Museum whose latest exhibit has celebrities green with envy, to a lowrider artist who uses cars as his canvas.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Exploring music's artistic significance, by going on stage with a Latin funk band from Miami, inside the studio with record label Buskin, and into the classroom at the Los Angeles College of Music.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: An extensive look into the design and performance of auto manufacturer, Jaguar.

programme.title: The Art Of
programme.desc: Find relaxation in a different and unexpected way with Jamie Ford as she performs a sound bath; Delta faucets shows how to find relaxation at home.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a car accident leads Charlie and Rex to investigate reports of a strange blue light in the sky, they discover the truth is more science than fiction.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex have a run-in with a wanted criminal, when his past catches up with him.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a murder at the shipping container port, Charlie and Rex partner with a Border Security officer to track down the mastermind behind a smuggling ring.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex pull apart the secrets of a local band when their lead singer is found dead on the beach.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The clock is ticking as Charlie and Rex attempt to find a murderer before the victim can succumb to the poison slowly killing them.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex are thrust into action when a popular social media star meets an untimely demise while livestreaming her wedding.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Joyce Barnaby finds a body in Midsomer Florey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy are called to the warring villages of Upper and Lower Warden; they investigate the death of a young film star at the family's ancestral home.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Fishermen and women flock to the village of Solomon Gorge, desperate to catch a giant fish that is said to lurk in the lake.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Pam believes their bungalow is big enough, but her husband disagrees.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A couple and their teenagers struggle with a small home.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: One-of-a-kind bride Nicoletta arrives with crystals, sage and a plan to marry herself and new consultant Cierra is all for it; paraplegic bride Natalie hopes to experience that magical bridal feeling.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Michaela is getting married in an Irish castle, and she wants a princess dress for less than a king's ransom; fashionista Shavonne has a high-style reputation to maintain.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: A bride and groom from "Big Brother" shop together; social media pro Kristin must look perfect; chef Cat Cora gets married.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man sues his property manager for inhospitable living conditions, but she says he did nothing to follow up.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A movie producer has investors breathing down his neck for millions of dollars.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Two motorists dispute what color the light was, and who was at fault; two businessmen decide to share a credit card for advertising expenses.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A small-business owner tries to blame his broken dreams on his landlords, but the lease states that they are not responsible for things falling apart.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: The judge openly admits she dislikes a married man being sued by his ex-girlfriend, who says he went back to his wife and took her truck with him; a married couple go after a mechanic they say stole their money and damaged their property.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Sad news is delivered in the midst of a fight between ex-roommates over ruined credit and accusations of identity theft; a grandmother says a 13-year-old boy crashed his bike into her vehicle while she was in the process of passing him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Sued for an unpaid bill, the plaintiff's cousin accuses her of frequently getting into fights with other people.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man sues his on-and-off girlfriend for repayment of a loan and late fees.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The defendant says he and the plaintiff broke up because she didn't like that he went out and partied without her.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: After a bride was unfaithful early in their relationship, the groom now battles with extreme jealousy and control issues that have her family worried about her emotional well-being. Also, her cultural traditions clash with his ambitions.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: A bride hopes that her groom can relinquish his identity as a ladies' man and focus on becoming the family man that she needs and wants him to be; but without a father figure of his own growing up, he struggles with what that role should entail.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: An interracial couple try to navigate cultural differences and crossed boundaries with their families; while the bride insists she has sufficiently grieved the death of her first husband, the groom must draw a firm line with his overbearing sister.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: A divorced couple decides to give their marriage another chance but have kept their engagement a secret from family and friends. Once the happy news is revealed, their loved ones are left shocked, confused and more than a little concerned.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: Holiday-themed clips include the following: an ugly Christmas sweater causes trouble, a toddler tries to jump on the photo of a trampoline, a little boy obliviously walks around his Christmas gift, and a dog causes calamity in the kitchen.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: Nine finalists compete for the $100,000 prize; basketball blunders; trick shots; curious cats.

programme.title: School Daze
programme.desc: At historically black Mission College, the activist-minded Dap (Larry Fishburne) immerses himself in a world of political rhetoric and social movements -- one day he hopes to rally the students as a united front. At the other end of the spectrum, Julian (Giancarlo Esposito), the head of the biggest fraternity on campus, is more concerned with maintaining a strict social order. In between, Dap's co

programme.title: First-Time Buyer's Club
programme.desc: A blended family who's outgrowing their townhome looks for an upgrade; Amina helps them search for a larger home while navigating square footage, school zones and monthly HOA payments to find the perfect fit.

programme.title: School Daze
programme.desc: At historically black Mission College, the activist-minded Dap (Larry Fishburne) immerses himself in a world of political rhetoric and social movements -- one day he hopes to rally the students as a united front. programme.title: First-Time Buyer's Club
programme.desc: A blended family who's outgrowing their townhome looks for an upgrade; Amina helps them search for a larger home while navigating square footage, school zones and monthly HOA payments to find the perfect fit.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: Nine finalists compete for the $100,000 prize; basketball blunders; trick shots; curious cats.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: A newly engaged couple leave their families reeling when they surprise them with news of their upcoming wedding; when their bombshell revelation blows up, they are forced to look beyond their fantasy and confront the reality of their lives.

programme.title: Family or Fiancé
programme.desc: Two brides planning their wedding hope to resolve issues with their own mothers on their road to happily ever after; while one mother desperately wishes to be part of her daughter's life, another prays her daughter's sexuality is merely a phase.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: New consultant Cat has her work cut out for her trying to find the perfect dress for singer-songwriter Mary Lambert; bride Emerald finally has her dress delivered; bald bride Rachel makes comments that bring Randy to tears.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Julianna wants the sexiest dress ever, but her fiancé's family are afraid she'll say yes to a dress she'll regret; jumpsuit enthusiast Randell wants a wedding onesie.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jennifer wants to break out of her taekwondo uniform; Madison is forced to choose sides when the opinions of her two mothers collide.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Judge Corriero questions the intentions of a plaintiff who brought a woman in off the street and bought her a car.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A Camry with faulty steering careens into a Jaguar parked on the street; a man buys a truck from his tattoo artist.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A man sues the disc jockey he hired for his golden wedding anniversary party.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A landlord's tenant moves out and takes the air conditioner with him.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman accused of stealing thousands of dollars from her cousin tries to clear her name by passing a polygraph test; a late night call from a construction worker ends with an adult "sleepover" and accusations of stealing money and ruining a futon.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman drops off her two children at day care and doesn't pick them up for months; makeshift movers are accused of damaging property; a woman waits for a disability check to make a final payment on a trailer, then changes her mind about moving in.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff admits to cheating on the defendant because he did not give her enough attention.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her former roommate for rent, a late fee and a cleaning fee, saying the defendant moved out without notice.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for emotional distress and unpaid rent; he admits he is still in love with her but claims their relationship didn't work out because she was verbally and physically abusive.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: Roe hosts a sexy dinner party for the ladies. Muneera opens old wounds as she reconnects with her father. La'Torria helps Jordan go ring shopping for Chloe, and Roe finally reaches out to Sophia's father to discuss their co-parenting issues.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: The group suspects Chloe is behind the chaos among the friends, and Chloe's upset about being considered a bone collector. Muneera's family dinner implodes when a key guest refuses to join. Roe's ex comes to town to work on co-parenting Sophia.

programme.title: Heart & Hustle: Houston
programme.desc: The ladies gather to address their ongoing drama, but tensions boil over when LeBrina and Chloe clash. Meanwhile, Roe has an emotional therapy session with her ex, and Alaina receives shocking news that leaves her reeling.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: Latrice and Glen bring the Collective and their men to Atlanta to celebrate Selena and Mike's wedding. Marie is upset over false rumors that her business has closed. Kerri continues to lock horns with Marlene. Glen bonds with his son at the barber shop.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: The Belles and their men celebrate Mike and Selena's upcoming wedding. The group bonds at a big Atlanta nightclub. Matt and Kerri lock horns over getting the smallest bedroom in the house, and their conflict spills over quite publicly with the group.

programme.title: Belle Collective
programme.desc: During a tea tour of Atlanta, Marie and Kerri argue about Kerri's tone and Marie's business. Latrice and Glen's surprise for the group goes over poorly with Mike. Later in Jackson, Selena and Mike's wedding goes left when the food does not show up.
